name: Captain Sonar
description: Captain Sonar is Roberto Fraga and Yohan Lemonnier's real-time team submarine duel — two crews of four (Captain, First Mate, Engineer, Radio Operator) hunt each other across hidden grid-maps, plotting course with dry-erase markers while the opposing radio operator tracks their movements. Charge torpedoes, drop mines, deploy sonar pings — all while shouting across the table in a controlled chaos that feels like a Hollywood sub thriller.
